Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify distinct patient profiles recurring across events namely 45 M in ER 62 F in ER and 28 M in Surgery

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Match events by shared attributes such as patient age patient gender department and compatible clinical details

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Infer that the 45 M ER sequence forms one case because it follows a coherent flow of Register patient Initial triage X ray imaging Doctor consultation and Patient discharged

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Infer that the 62 F ER sequence forms one case because it follows a coherent flow of Register patient Initial triage Lab test requested Lab test completed Doctor consultation Prescription created and Patient discharged

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Infer that the 28 M Surgery sequence forms one case because it follows a coherent flow of Register patient Doctor consultation Surgery preparation Surgery performed Recovery room and Patient discharged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check that timestamps within each inferred case progress in logical temporal order and that no event conflicts with another patient profile

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Propose three case groupings Case 1 events 1 4 7 12 15 Case 2 events 2 5 8 10 11 14 17 Case 3 events 3 6 9 13 16 18
